scripts.test: npm run test:build && node test/smoke.mjs && node test/units.mjs && node test/cost.test.mjs && node test/simulation.test.mjs && node test/gapDetection.test.mjs && node test/extremes.test.mjs && node test/dst.test.mjs && node test/csv.test.mjs && node test/annual.test.mjs
scripts.test:units: npm run test:build && node test/units.mjs && node test/cost.test.mjs && node test/simulation.test.mjs && node test/gapDetection.test.mjs && node test/extremes.test.mjs && node test/dst.test.mjs && node test/csv.test.mjs && node test/annual.test.mjs
scripts.test:build: npx esbuild src/utils/cost.ts src/utils/simulation.ts src/utils/timezone.ts src/utils/csv.ts src/utils/gapDetection.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --outdir=.test-build --out-extension:.js=.mjs
